unit: Unit 1 - PHP Fundamentals and Environment Setup

Introduction to PHP: Definition and role of PHP in web development
PHP features and advantages: Integration with web servers and databases
Ease of learning and community support
Software requirements and installation: Required web server and PHP runtime
Apache configuration for PHP on Windows
PHP syntax and data types: Primitive data types: int, float, string, boolean
Variables, constants, and scope: Scope types: local, global, and static
Operators and expressions: Arithmetic, relational, logical, and assignment operators
Running a PHP script: Executing scripts through the web server
